claims.claim: China's private equity market remains one of the largest globally, with AUM exceeding $1.5 trillion as of 2024
Fundraising has slowed sharply from the 2021 peak, declining by approximately 30% year-on-year in 2023-2024
Deal activity is shifting away from consumer internet and real estate toward technology, healthcare, and green energy

claims.claim: Exit channels are constrained: IPO volumes onshore and offshore have dropped significantly
claims.location_ref: Location -> [Key highlights] | Para 1 | "Exit channels" -> "have dropped significantly"

claims.claim: Domestic PE firms, such as Hillhouse and CDH, have increased their market share to over 70% of fundraising
The Chinese private equity market has experienced a remarkable growth trajectory over the past decade, with AUM expanding from approximately $500 billion in 2015 to over $1.5 trillion in 2024
claims.section: China Private Equity Market Remains Large but Faces Headwinds from Regulation and Economy
